================================================================================
DIRECTIVE - constrained-by with path and anchor
================================================================================

<!-- constrained-by /docs/spec.md#rationale -->

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

(document
  (section
    (directive_comment)))

================================================================================
DIRECTIVE - blocked-by with path only
================================================================================

<!-- blocked-by /tasks/setup.md -->

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

(document
  (section
    (directive_comment)))

================================================================================
DIRECTIVE - supersedes with path and anchor
================================================================================

<!-- supersedes /old/design.md#approach -->

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

(document
  (section
    (directive_comment)))

================================================================================
DIRECTIVE - derived-from with anchor only (same-file reference)
================================================================================

<!-- derived-from #rationale -->

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

(document
  (section
    (directive_comment)))

================================================================================
DIRECTIVE - constrained-by with section name containing spaces
================================================================================

<!-- constrained-by /docs/spec.md#my section name -->

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

(document
  (section
    (directive_comment)))

================================================================================
DIRECTIVE - inside a section below a heading
================================================================================

## Implementation

<!-- derived-from #design -->

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

(document
  (section)
  (section
    (atx_heading
      (atx_h2_marker)
      (inline))
    (directive_comment)))

================================================================================
DIRECTIVE - regular HTML comment is NOT a directive (preserved as html_block)
================================================================================

<!-- just a regular comment -->

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

(document
  (section
    (html_block)))

================================================================================
DIRECTIVE - HTML comment with unknown keyword is NOT a directive
================================================================================

<!-- unknown-keyword /some/path -->

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

(document
  (section
    (html_block)))
